{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_0","type":"agent_message","text":"Break the import from `src/domain/billing.ts` to `src/presentation/invoice-view.ts`.

Why:

- It is both part of the 3-file cycle and the explicit `layer_violation`.
- The domain layer should not depend on presentation. That edge inverts the architecture and is the least defensible dependency in the ring.
- Breaking it likely fixes two findings at once:
  - `circular_dependency`
  - `layer_violation`

The cycle is:

```text
src/application/billing-flow.ts
 -> src/domain/billing.ts
 -> src/presentation/invoice-view.ts
 -> src/application/billing-flow.ts
```

Recommended fix: move whatever `billing.ts` needs from `invoice-view.ts` into a neutral/domain-owned module, or replace the presentation import with a domain-owned interface/type. If it is only needed for typing, convert it to `import type`, but only if there is no runtime usage."}}
